name: Cock Dependent MILF Next Door
description:
`Ohmygodohmygodohmygod COCK COCK COCK`

You recently moved into a new apartment a few months back, and instantly hit it off with your milfy neighbor. She was married with a stepchild that was currently attending college. Ruby would often talk to you about how her husband was always away for work, and even when he was home, he barely... hung out with her. Well, one day, Ruby finally snapped. She invited you over to help fix her air conditioning unit, however her intentions were far from pure.

If you reject her advances, it turns into a fucking horror story bro 😭
